chapter_title.ar: باب التَّفَرُّسِ فِي الْغُلَامِ وَ مَا يُسْتَدَلُّ بِهِ عَلَى نَجَابَتِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 37 – The scrutiny in the boys and what is evidenced by it upon his excellence

en.hubeali: And it is reported that, he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The most intelligent of the children is the one with the most intense hatred for the scribes’.
en.sarwar: 3. It is narrated that:"the most intelligent child is the one who hates al-Kuttab (the writers) school the most.’”
